2. Activate the virtual environment and verify it is active by checking the prompt or environment variable.

    - `requests==2.26.0`

    flask==2.0.1: secure
    requests==2.26.0: secure
    pycryptodome==3.10.1: secure
    pytz==2021.3: secure
    ```
8. Ensure the virtual environment directory and all files are owned by the current user and have appropriate read and write permissions.
9. Do not modify any system-wide Python settings or configurations (e.g., no changes to `/usr`, `/etc`, or other protected directories).
